title: Cholavandān heat wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Cholavandān with a Z-Score of +3.11. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures.
body:
The current heat wave in Cholavandān has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is unusually high, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 9.9 GG, indicating a significant increase in energy demand for cooling. 
 The relative humidity is at 69% and the wind speed is 10.6 km/h, which may provide some slight relief but is not enough to mitigate the heat wave's impact.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave mitigation measures immediately.
